name: NEXCOM International Co., Ltd.
summary: NEXCOM International Co., Ltd. provides Internet of Things (IoT) automation solutions, intelligent platform and services, mobile computing solutions, network and communication solutions, intelligent digital security, and medical and healthcare informatics products worldwide. The company offers IoT automation solutions, such as industrial fanless computer, google cloud IoT ready solution, industrial wireless solution, industry firewall solution, IoT solution, industrial touch computer, machine automation, PC-based factory automation, and software solution; and smart system solutions, including AI accelerators, interactive signage solution packs, multimedia player application platforms, multimedia machine tablets, embedded computer, open frame tablets, TV wall digital electronic signage solutions, digital electronic signboard dedicated hardware platforms, point of sale terminals, and rack industrial computers. It also provides car computer suctions comprising AI edge telematics solutions, embedded add-on modules, mobile NVRs, car computers, car network equipment, car touch screen computers, rugged car displays, modular on-board computers, and railway computers. In addition, the company offers network communication solutions, including cyber security solutions, edge and cloud solutions, industrial gateway solutions, network peripheral solutions, and SoC capability and S/W services; and smart medical solutions, such as healthcare medical, IoT gateway, software package, and video conference system. Further, it provides intelligent monitoring solutions comprising 3D cameras, panoramic cameras, license plate recognition cameras, monitoring video platforms, and webcams; and smart system and movie and film solutions. NEXCOM International Co., Ltd. was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
